title: Incedium weapons X spore
description: a mod that makes the incendium weapons work with the mobs fro Fungal infection spore
body:
A rly simple datapack that adds a compatiblity betewn incendium weapons and fungal infection spore mobs, making them vulnerable to the incendium weapons.

[here is a link to fungal infection spore server](https://discord.gg/nC6aZgjp).

[here is a link to incendium/terralith/nullspace server ](https://discord.gg/VJFFSqm6)
